headline: AI can now access your credit cards — how to protect yourself from being scammed
summary: Experts warn that AI-powered finance tools can expose sensitive data if you’re not careful.

raw.headline: AI can now access your credit cards — how to protect yourself from being scammed
raw.summary: Experts warn that AI-powered finance tools can expose sensitive data if you’re not careful.

headline: American Express (AXP) Joins X402 And Raises Platinum Card Fee To $895
summary: American Express (NYSE:AXP) has joined Visa, Mastercard, and Stripe in backing the x402 Foundation, an AI driven, open source payment protocol initiative. The company has also raised the annual fee on its Platinum card, marking the first change to this premium product’s pricing since 2021. For investors watching American Express, these moves highlight how a long established payments and card issuer is responding to shifts in technology and customer expectations. The x402 collaboration links...

headline: Down 22% In A Year: Is PayPal A Value Trap Or A Turnaround Play?
summary: With its stock trading at a deep discount, PayPal is betting a new CEO and a major overhaul can fix what's broken, forcing investors to weigh a potential bargain against a difficult transformation.

raw.headline: Down 22% In A Year: Is PayPal A Value Trap Or A Turnaround Play?
